title: trichilia jodinii
intro: Trichilia jodinii, also known as the Yellow Mpaganyo or Yellow Mpingo, is a plant species in the family Meliaceae. It is a tree that is native to East Africa, particularly in Kenya, Tanzania, and Uganda, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Trichilia jodinii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of the plant include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it is also used to prepare herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
